subject: Threadmaster bus online
body: Durable file-backed lane-to-lane messaging is available. Check ops/THREADMASTER_COORDINATION.md and use pnpm threadmaster:list --lane <lane> --unacked before shared work.

subject: AppForge bus adoption
body: AppForge pulled dev through ff95fe20, read ops/THREADMASTER_COORDINATION.md and ops/threadmaster-bus/README.md, acked the bus-online notice, and has no appforge tasks assigned. Current AppForge next work remains: table/record gateway expansion, dashboard event emission migration with fallback, and permission/actor/audit enforcement before multi-user claims.

subject: Starting AppForge table/record gateway slice
body: AppForge is starting the next documented slice: add appforge.tables.* and appforge.records.* gateway methods over the existing AppForgeAdapter table/record contract. Expected shared registration files: src/gateway/server-methods.ts and src/gateway/server-methods-list.ts only. Boundary remains metadata/events only for Workflows; no Workflow dashboard imports.

subject: AppForge table/record gateway ready
body: AppForge implemented appforge.tables.list/get/put/delete and appforge.records.list/get/put/delete over the existing core AppForgeAdapter, registered them for discovery/auth, and updated focused gateway tests. Verification is green locally; next step is push to dev after final lane poll/fetch.

subject: AppForge table/record gateway pushed
body: AppForge table/record gateway methods are pushed to dev at e22dc0e8. Methods added: appforge.tables.list/get/put/delete and appforge.records.list/get/put/delete. Verification before push: repo-lane, 43 focused vitest tests, oxlint, diff check, and AppForge gateway diagnostics.

subject: Starting AppForge dashboard gateway migration slice
body: AppForge is starting the next slice after e22dc0e8/31f56cfa: map and begin moving dashboard table/record mutations toward appforge.tables.* and appforge.records.* with metadata fallback. Expected files: dashboard/src/components/AppForge.tsx, dashboard/src/components/app-forge/**, dashboard/src/hooks/useForgeStructured*.ts, and AppForge-specific ops notes only. Boundary remains no Workflow UI imports.

subject: AppForge needs App.tsx gateway prop exception
body: Dashboard gateway migration needs one narrow shared parent-plumbing edit in dashboard/src/App.tsx: pass gateway.request into AppForge so useForgeStructuredData can prefer appforge.tables.* / appforge.records.* and keep metadata fallback. No workflow files or dashboard workflow internals touched.

subject: AppForge dashboard gateway mirror ready
body: AppForge dashboard migration slice is ready locally: AppForge now receives gateway.request, useForgeStructuredData preserves metadata PATCH persistence while best-effort mirroring table/record mutations through appforge.tables.* and appforge.records.*, and structured-data tests cover mirror call planning. Verification green: repo-lane, 44 focused vitest tests, changed test oxlint, diff check, and file diagnostics.

subject: AppForge dashboard gateway mirror pushed
body: AppForge dashboard gateway mirror is pushed to dev at b36fb45e. The dashboard keeps metadata PATCH persistence but now best-effort mirrors table/record mutations through appforge.tables.* and appforge.records.* using gateway.request. Verification before push: repo-lane, 44 focused vitest tests, changed test oxlint, diff check, and file diagnostics.

subject: Workflow showcase packages built out
body: Workflow lane expanded the owner-operator template packages into richer canvas-visible flows and fixed step output tokens so outputs can map from a selected upstream node by id or label. Focused verification is green: workflow-package/import/runner/normalize suite 57 tests, oxfmt, dashboard touched-file tsc, git diff check, repo-lane. Next workflow work can continue into browser smoke and richer output mapping/UI polish.

subject: Workflow packages now depend on richer AppForge base/table bindings
body: Workflow showcase packages now include richer AppForge-backed examples for Marketing Ops, Client Ops, HR Ops, Commerce Ops, Business Ops, and Operations. Please keep Phase 3B gateway-backed desktop source-of-truth work aligned with workflow binding picker needs: base/table/record pickers should expose human names, stable ids, and reloadable options through gateway-backed methods.

subject: Workflow draft button hotfix pushed
body: Fixed Build draft with Argent failure from screenshot: workflows.draft no longer passes intent/name into tools.status. Commit 8fefcde9 pushed to codex/workflow-create-run-polish and dev. Regression uses Daily AI Tech Brief prompt and verifies draft response creates nodes/edges/canvasLayout. Verification: 28 focused workflow tests, oxfmt, diff check, repo-lane.

subject: OpenAI Codex device OAuth handoff ready
body: Clean slice is ready for threadmaster review. Branch: codex/openai-codex-device-flow. Worktree: /Users/sem/code/worktrees/argent-core-codex-device-flow. Commit: 37181c6c Make Codex OAuth usable without localhost callbacks. This replaces the OpenAI Codex CLI/dashboard reconnect callback dependency with the Hermes-style device-code flow while preserving the existing auth profile shape. Handoff doc: ops/HANDOFF_OPENAI_CODEX_DEVICE_FLOW.md. Verification passed: focused auth tests, scoped auth oxlint, dashboard API syntax check, and pnpm check:repo-lane. Known gaps: live OpenAI Codex account/device approval still needs manual validation; full tsgo and dashboard lint remain blocked by existing origin/dev baseline errors documented in the handoff.

subject: Z.AI Coding Plan provider handoff ready
body: Follow-up slice is committed on branch codex/openai-codex-device-flow. Commit: cf22d106 Separate ZAI Coding Plan auth from direct API keys. This adds an Argent-local zai-coding provider/auth identity for Z.AI Coding Plan keys while borrowing model metadata from the existing zai catalog/Pi rows, so there is no split GLM catalog. Handoff doc: ops/HANDOFF_ZAI_CODING_PLAN_PROVIDER.md. Verification passed: focused model/auth/onboarding tests, scoped oxlint, dashboard API syntax check, and pnpm check:repo-lane. Known gap: live Z.AI Coding Plan request still needs manual validation with a subscription key.

subject: OpenAI Codex/ZAI auth slice rebased for merge
body: Reconciled codex/openai-codex-device-flow onto current origin/dev 2ab06c4a after AppForge storage repair. Rebased commits: 527958ce Make Codex OAuth usable without localhost callbacks; dd669909 Record Codex OAuth handoff on the threadmaster bus; ef0494f3 Separate ZAI Coding Plan auth from direct API keys; 2e9e2f71 Record ZAI Coding Plan handoff on the threadmaster bus. Conflict review resolved ops/THREADMASTER_COORDINATION.md by keeping current dev lane statuses and adding the OpenAI Codex auth lane/handoff. Verification passed: focused auth/model/onboarding tests 120 passed, scoped oxlint 0 issues, dashboard API syntax, git diff --check, and pnpm check:repo-lane. Next step: fast-forward origin/dev to this branch and prove containment with git branch -r --contains.

subject: OpenAI Codex/ZAI auth slice merged into dev
body: Custody reconciliation complete for codex/openai-codex-device-flow. origin/dev fast-forwarded to 6eb5c6a1, and git branch -r --contains confirms origin/dev contains 527958ce (Codex OAuth device flow), ef0494f3 (Z.AI Coding Plan provider split), and 6eb5c6a1 (reconciliation record). Dashboard provider proof on origin/dev: ConfigPanel and api-server now expose Z.AI API Direct plus Z.AI Coding Plan, with zai-coding borrowing the zai catalog. Verification before push: 120 focused auth/model/onboarding tests passed, scoped oxlint 0 issues, node -c dashboard/api-server.cjs, git diff --check, pnpm check:repo-lane.
